**Section:** <!-- e.g., §3 Query Standards -->

<!-- What does the file currently say / do? -->

```
Paste the problematic content here
```

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should it say / do instead? -->

## Why This Is Wrong

<!-- Provide a reference: official docs link, RFC, or reasoning -->

**Reference:** [link to official documentation]

## Impact

<!-- How serious is this? -->
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — actively causes insecure or broken code
- [ ] 🟡 Major — misleads on important architectural decisions
- [ ] 🟢 Minor — inaccuracy with low practical impact
